a:r.a:t: : Shift from reactive aging reports to forward-looking strategies.
: Drive collections using dynamic, multi-factor risk scores.
Empower business users with analytics, reducing IT reliance.
: Unify AR data to eliminate manual reconciliation.
: Leverage machine learning to forecast payment behaviors.
: Integrate role-based dashboards directly into workflows.
: Anticipate and mitigate payment delays early.
: Focus collection teams purely on high-impact accounts.
: Deliver fast, trusted insights for working capital decisions.
: Design collection processes around a dynamic worklist prioritized by ML-driven risk scores from Databricks, fundamentally shifting focus from static aging to predictive risk.
: Natural language queries like "Just Ask“ and “Smart Insights” are considered on SAC stories.
: Pull AR data directly from S/4HANA Data Products.
: Build a centralized, governed semantic layer.
: Develop ML models using secure, zero-copy Delta Sharing.
: Clean separation of data warehousing and advanced analytics.
: Ensure a single version of truth via the semantic layer.
: Deliver immediate, decision-ready data through live connections.
